title: Tama’s Kidnapping Exposes Wano’s Cruelty
description: On pages 9–12, this part focuses on Unknown person #9, Jack, Unknown person #10, Okobore Town Villagers, Unknown person #11, Tsuru as Luffy and Zoro push into Kuri and Bakura Town as Tama’s kidnapping exposes the cruelty of the Beast Pirates.
scene: Luffy and Zoro move through Kuri and Bakura Town while Tama’s kidnapping pulls them into open conflict with the Beast Pirates.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We haven't seen each other since that fateful day in Saboody, have we?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: I doubt you're here to sightsee.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I didn't expect your whole alliance to enter this country together.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: surprised that I know? I came across straw hat earlier.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I assume you sought to seal my lips before I could tell anyone, but...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Lord Holdem has been defeated by the bandits!

dialogue.speaker: Jack
dialogue.text: We've already reported to Lord Jack!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Those guys... this is the worst conceivable situation!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: We're in a bit of a hurry!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You are swore up and down that you wouldn't cause trouble!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And not only did you get on the wanted list,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You've gone and done something bad enough to get Jack called out!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: I have been looking for a

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Your job was to be a Ronin in the flower capital! Why are you all the way out here, in Kuri?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: WHA- WHO IS HE?! IS THIS OKAY?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Zorojuro! We'll be out of the city soon!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Hey, hey! Wait a minute, you mongrels!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The name's LuffTaro! Any- one asks, you tell 'em!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So much drinkable water... how many years has it been...

summary: This section advances the Wano Country - Kuri storyline with 53 dialogue beats. The rescue of Tama brings Luffy, Zoro, Kiku, and Law into direct contact with Wano’s local oppression.
